content:
Category: AOD Services 
Existing Content: "Substance abuse treatment, addiction recovery, detox programs."

Added Queries: 

-"Where can I get help for my drug addiction?" 
-"I need to detox, where can I find a detoxification program?" 
-"Can anyone recommend a substance abuse treatment center?" 
-"My friend needs help quitting drugs, where can she find treatment?" 
-"I'm struggling with addiction and don't know where to turn, who can guide me?" 
-"I'm homeless and need detoxification services, who will provide these services for free?" 
-"Can I get treatment for alcohol addiction in this city?" 
-"Where can I find recovery programs for drug addiction?" 
-"Are there organizations that provide treatment services for substance abuse?" 
-"What are my options if I want to quit drinking?" 
-"Where can I get treatment for opioid addiction?" 
-"I'm addicted to drugs and need urgent help. How can I get it?" 
-"Are there any free treatment services available for drug addicts?" 
-"Help! I'm addicted to alcohol and need a treatment facility!" 
-"I can't afford rehab, are there any free recovery programs?
